description: Full-screen chapter card with a large drop word, chapter label, and supporting context line

fields.CHAPTER_WORD: Chapter identifier shown small, e.g. 'CHAPTER ONE' or 'PART TWO'
fields.CHAPTER_SUB: The large hero word that drops in, e.g. 'INFILTRATION' or 'THE BREACH'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: One sentence of context shown below the hero word, e.g. 'In early 2020, attackers gained their first foothold.'
